title: Has anyone here tried Gerard McMann AI trading platform? Curious about real experience
author: Civil_Essay_7324
selftext:
I was looking through some of the trading platforms that utilize artificial intelligence recently and found out about Gerard McMann. It was something I had never heard of before, and hence my curiosity got the better of me.

As far as I could tell, it was a combination of AI and traditional trading elements such as various order types, monitoring of your portfolio, and access to several markets. It may look good from the outside, but let’s face it; many platforms look good until you test them yourself.

Being someone who isn’t too fond of algorithmic trading and other similar techniques, I wanted to know whether this platform was indeed useful for everyday traders like myself or whether it was more geared towards professional or sophisticated traders.

Has anyone used Gerard McMann? Does the AI component provide any advantage over conventional platforms or is it another ""smart"" component that doesn't work well in practice?

comments.author: Sad_Reference8020
comments.body: I gave it a try last month. Nothing crazy, but I liked how simple it felt compared to other Al tools. Didn't feel lost using it.

comments.author: Malcom117
comments.body: Same here, I randomly came across it a few days ago but didn’t dig much. Following this thread to see what people say.

comments.author: Hybron__
comments.body: Tried it for a bit and it’s actually not bad. Feels more beginner friendly than most of the AI trading stuff I’ve seen.

comments.author: Standard-Brother-831
comments.body: I have also bad experience about mt5 bots and algos, they are definetely not so accurate like they promoting, most results are fake and backtest results, are not guarantee the live test results, but i have switched my trading strategy to orderflow, and found one algo that reads live orderflow data and volume profile and a couple more inidcations to give very powerful entries and exits, currently i have secured 5k payout from lucid and hopefully can get another 5k next week, currently it has performed very well and im 4 day winning streak

comments.author: Careful_Designer_811
comments.body: I just joined it,how the heck do you log out of it.Got a financial advisor,he made an appointment with me and didn’t keep it,think I’m being scammed
